description: Verify the observer PID file lifecycle: when no observer is running, the PID file is absent; after writing a PID file it exists; after cleanup it is removed.

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const pidFile=p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','forge-master-observer.pid'); if(fs.existsSync(pidFile))throw new Error('pid file must not exist before start'); fs.writeFileSync(pidFile,String(process.pid)); if(!fs.existsSync(pidFile))throw new Error('pid file must exist after write'); fs.rmSync(pidFile,{force:true}); if(fs.existsSync(pidFile))throw new Error('pid file must be gone after stop'); console.log('ok observer pid lifecycle: absent before, present during, absent after');"
